result.summary: Found 2 major issues: text and content being truncated on the right side of the page, indicating layout overflow or responsive design problems.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is truncated - 'Hot Gam' appears to be cut off (likely 'Hot Games'). The rightmost navigation item is not fully visible.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation bar layout to ensure all tab labels are fully visible. Consider using shorter labels, wrapping text, or adjusting container width.

issues.description: Game cards in the exclusive and new games sections are cut off on the right edge. The rightmost game card in each row is partially hidden, affecting content discovery and user experience.
issues.suggestion: Fix the horizontal overflow by adjusting the carousel/grid container width and ensuring proper padding. Ensure all game cards are fully visible within the viewport or properly contained within a scrollable area.

issues.description: Game card images and titles appear to have inconsistent sizing and alignment across different rows, creating a visually uneven appearance.
issues.suggestion: Ensure consistent CSS grid sizing for all game cards and standardize padding/margins across all items for a uniform visual presentation.
